meta.title: How powerful could America's new F-47 stealth fighter really be?
meta.description:
Just how powerful could America’s new stealth fighter, the F-47, really be?

Well, to be blunt, it could be the most powerful fighter ever to take to the sky, and the deciding factor will almost certainly be the size of the engine compartments in this new fighter.
